chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 680 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.3276/2024 2. For hearing of main case 11.03.2025 Mr. Hyder Ali Khan, advocate for the petitioner Malik Naeem Iqbal, advocate for respondent-SRB Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Learned counsel for Sindh Revenue Board submits that the impugned show cause notice is being withdrawn forthwith. In view of the said representation learned counsel states that the petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
